SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is made and entered into as of October 15, 2023, by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No.: S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, with a registered office at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 048621, on behalf of SingaTech Innovations Pte Ltd (UEN: 202312345A).

Contact Information:
Phone: +65 6123 4567
Email: tanweiming@example.sg

WHEREAS, the Purchaser agrees to purchase from the Seller, and the Seller agrees to sell to the Purchaser, shares in the capital of SingaTech Innovations Pte Ltd for a total purchase price of SGD 2,500,000 (the "Purchase Price").

It is expressly stated that this document does not contain a project plan or project status report. The parties have not included any such details within the SPA.

For identification purposes, please visit https://example.sg/user/S2345678B for further information regarding the Purchaser's NRIC.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this SPA on the day and year first above written.
